sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 37

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 37:1
items.html: (to the question) Although the Nukva cleaves to the new NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], which are the AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] of Gadlut, she nevertheless receives from ZA only of the discernment of the NHY of Katnut, which have now risen and become HGT [Hesed, Gevura, Tiferet] for him. Therefore the Yesod illuminates to the Nukva only her discernment of Tiferet, and the Nukva has no discernment of Yesod in the corresponding discernment in ZA, for his Yesod rose and became the upper third of Tiferet. Hence the Yesod and Malchut of the Nukva have nothing to lean upon. (p. 784, beginning "And this")
